title: Connector
description: A named, typed connection configuration for a physical data store (S3, GCS, Azure Blob, RDBMS, Kafka, filesystem, HTTP API, or lakehouse).

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

kind.description: The storage technology type: s3, gcs, azureBlob, rdbms, kafka, filesystem, httpApi, or lakehouse.

config.description: Connector-specific configuration object. Structure is defined by the `kind` value.

status.description: Operational status: active (default), disabled, or deprecated.
